pcaconnectorad.templategroupaccesscontro: Allow or deny permissions for an Active Directory group to enroll or autoenroll certificates for a template.

pcaconnectorad.templategroupaccesscontro.Description: Allow or deny an Active Directory group from autoenrolling certificates issued against a template. The Active Directory group must be allowed to enroll to allow autoenrollment
Allow or deny an Active Directory group from enrolling certificates issued against a template.
